Bishwa Prakash Puri

Interdisciplinary Researcher • Consultant • Educator

Based in Sydney, Australia, available globally. I help governments, NGOs, universities, and research institutions solve complex climate-hydrology-policy challenges using evidence-driven strategies, data science, and practical implementation.

Core Expertise

  • Hydrologic modeling (SWAT, HEC-HMS)
  • Climate impact assessment and resilience
  • GIS, remote sensing, and spatial analysis
  • Policy research and sustainability strategy
  • Study abroad consulting and academic mentoring

Target Audience

Governments, NGOs, universities, students, research institutions, international organizations.
